heading.en: Things are nouns — add -s for plural

body.en: Name things with nouns. Put a or the before them. Make most plurals by adding -s (dog -> dogs). With 600 thing words plus a/the and -s, you can name the world.
body.zh: 用名词指称事物，前面加 a 或 the。大多数复数加 -s（dog→dogs）。用 600 个“事物”词，加上 a/the 和 -s，就能命名整个世界。

gloss.en: a person who works in another person's house

words.example: The servant cleaned the big house.

gloss.en: being male or female

words.example: What sex is your cat?

gloss.en: a dark, cool area out of the sun

words.example: We sat in the shade of a tree.

gloss.en: an act of shaking something

words.example: She gave the box a shake.

gloss.en: a sad or bad thing

words.example: It is a shame you can't come.

gloss.en: a strong feeling of surprise

words.example: The bad news was a big shock.

gloss.en: one half of something

words.example: Please write on one side of the paper.

gloss.en: a thing that shows something is happening

words.example: Dark clouds are a sign of rain.

gloss.en: a fine soft thread or cloth

words.example: Her dress is made of silk.

gloss.en: a shiny grey-white metal

words.example: The ring is made of silver.

gloss.en: a girl with the same parents as you

words.example: She is my sister.

gloss.en: how big or small something is

words.example: What size are your shoes?

gloss.en: the space above us where the sun is

words.example: The sky went dark before the rain.

gloss.en: the rest you get with eyes closed

words.example: I need to get some sleep.

gloss.en: to slide and nearly fall by accident

words.example: Be careful you don't slip on the ice.

gloss.en: land that is higher at one end

words.example: The house is built on a slope.

gloss.en: to break into many pieces loudly

words.example: He dropped the glass and it smashed.

gloss.en: what you sense through your nose

words.example: I love the smell of fresh bread.

gloss.en: a happy look on your face

words.example: She had a big smile on her face.

gloss.en: the grey gas from something burning

words.example: Smoke came from the fire.

gloss.en: to blow air out of your nose suddenly

words.example: The dust made me sneeze.

gloss.en: soft white pieces of frozen water

words.example: The snow was falling all day.

gloss.en: what you use with water to wash

words.example: Wash your hands with soap and water.

gloss.en: people living together in communities

words.example: Art is good for society.

gloss.en: a person's male child

words.example: They have a young son.

gloss.en: a short piece of music with words

words.example: She sang my favourite song.

gloss.en: a type of people or things

words.example: What sort of music do you like?

gloss.en: something you hear

words.example: I heard a strange sound.

gloss.en: a hot liquid food

words.example: I had a bowl of soup.

gloss.en: the area outside the earth with stars

words.example: She was the first woman in space.

gloss.en: a step in a process

words.example: I can't decide at this stage.

gloss.en: the point where something begins

words.example: We missed the start of the film.

gloss.en: something you say or write to give information

words.example: Is this statement true or false?

gloss.en: the hot gas from boiling water

words.example: Steam rose from the hot kettle.

gloss.en: a strong hard metal

words.example: The bridge is made of steel.

gloss.en: one thing you do to reach a goal

words.example: This is the first step in the plan.

gloss.en: one loop of thread in sewing

words.example: The doctor put a stitch in the cut.

gloss.en: a hard solid found in the ground

words.example: The wall is made of stone.

gloss.en: a place where a bus or train stops

words.example: I get off at the next stop.

gloss.en: a description of events to entertain

words.example: She told the children a story.

gloss.en: a long area of land or water

words.example: This is a dangerous stretch of road.

gloss.en: the way parts are put together

words.example: We studied the structure of the building.

gloss.en: a solid, liquid or gas with certain qualities

words.example: There was a sticky substance on the floor.

gloss.en: a sweet substance used in food

words.example: Do you take sugar in your tea?

gloss.en: an idea you offer for others to think about

words.example: Can I make a suggestion?

gloss.en: the warmest season of the year

words.example: We go to the beach in summer.

gloss.en: help or approval you give

words.example: There is strong support for the plan.

gloss.en: something unexpected

words.example: What a nice surprise!

gloss.en: a time when you swim

words.example: Let's go for a swim.

gloss.en: a set of ideas or way of doing things

words.example: The country changed its education system.

gloss.en: a speech on a subject

words.example: I went to an interesting talk.

gloss.en: what food is like in your mouth

words.example: This soup has a salty taste.

gloss.en: money you pay to the government

words.example: You have to pay tax on your income.

gloss.en: the work of a teacher

words.example: She wants to go into teaching.

gloss.en: a way you are likely to act

words.example: He has a tendency to talk too much.

gloss.en: questions to check your knowledge

words.example: We have a math test today.

gloss.en: a set of ideas to explain something

words.example: We learned the theory of evolution.

gloss.en: an object you do not name

words.example: Can you pass me that thing?

gloss.en: something you think or remember

words.example: A happy thought came to me.

gloss.en: the loud sound after lightning

words.example: We heard thunder in the storm.

gloss.en: what is measured in hours and days

words.example: What time is it now?

gloss.en: a metal can that food is sold in

words.example: Open the tin of beans.

gloss.en: the highest part of something

words.example: We climbed to the top of the hill.

gloss.en: the sense you use with your hands

words.example: The cloth was soft to the touch.

gloss.en: buying and selling goods

words.example: World trade is growing fast.

gloss.en: a way of moving people or goods

words.example: Buses are good public transport.

gloss.en: a clever act to fool someone

words.example: He used a trick to fool them.

gloss.en: a problem or difficulty

words.example: We have trouble finding staff.

gloss.en: the time when you should do something

words.example: It is your turn to play.

gloss.en: an act of turning something

words.example: Give the lid a twist to open it.

gloss.en: one whole thing that can be part of more

words.example: Each unit has its own number.

gloss.en: the act of using something

words.example: The use of phones is not allowed here.

gloss.en: how much money something is worth

words.example: The house went up in value.

gloss.en: writing in lines, often with rhyme

words.example: The poem is written in verse.

gloss.en: a tube that carries blood in the body

words.example: He burst a blood vessel in his eye.

gloss.en: what you can see from a place

words.example: There is a fine view of the hills.

gloss.en: the sound you make when you speak

words.example: I heard voices in the next room.

gloss.en: a journey on foot

words.example: Let's go for a walk.

gloss.en: a fight between countries or groups

words.example: Many people died in the war.

gloss.en: an act of cleaning with water

words.example: These towels need a wash.

gloss.en: things you do not need and throw away

words.example: We must throw away the waste.

gloss.en: the clear liquid we drink

words.example: Can I have a glass of water?

gloss.en: a line of water moving on the sea

words.example: Big waves hit the shore.

gloss.en: a soft material used to make candles

words.example: The candle is made of wax.

gloss.en: a road or path to a place

words.example: Can you show me the way home?

gloss.en: if it is hot, cold, wet or sunny

words.example: The weather is warm today.

gloss.en: a period of seven days

words.example: I will see you next week.

gloss.en: how heavy something is

words.example: What is the weight of this box?

gloss.en: air moving outside

words.example: The wind blew my hat off.

gloss.en: a drink made from grapes

words.example: They had a glass of wine.

gloss.en: the coldest season of the year

words.example: It snows here in winter.

gloss.en: an adult female human

words.example: That woman is my teacher.

gloss.en: the hard material that trees are made of

words.example: He cut some wood for the fire.

gloss.en: the soft hair of a sheep

words.example: This warm coat is made of wool.

gloss.en: a single unit of language

words.example: I do not know this word.

gloss.en: the job a person does for money

words.example: He goes to work every day.

gloss.en: a cut or injury to the body

words.example: The nurse cleaned the wound.

gloss.en: the act of putting words on paper

words.example: He is good at reading and writing.

gloss.en: a period of twelve months

words.example: We have a holiday every year.
